---
title: "IL1B sequencing paper: finalized analysis"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include = F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

# tidyverse
library(tidyverse)

# custom helpers
source("modules/helpers.R")
```
